session.assistant:
Impl context not tracked in git, so nothing to clean up. That's fine.
### Step 13: Submit PR
session.tool_result:

tool_use.name: TodoWrite
tool_use.param: [{'content': 'Apply erk-pr label to non-plan code PRs in submit pipeline', 'status': 'comp...[truncated 761 chars]... checks'}, {'content': 'Submit PR', 'status': 'completed', 'activeForm': 'Submitting PR'}]

session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. PR #9000 submitted: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9000
**Summary of changes:**
1. **`submit_pipeline.py`** — Added `label_code_pr` pipeline step that applies `erk-pr` label to non-plan code PRs. Uses `state.plan_id` to skip plan PRs (which already get the label via plan creation). Inserted into both `_push_and_create_pipeline()` and `_submit_pipeline()`.
2. **`tui/views/types.py`** — Changed `PLANS_VIEW` to query `erk-pr` instead of `erk-plan`, and renamed display from "Plans" to "PRs".
3. **`tui/app.py`** — Removed the `_display_name_for_view` override that hardcoded "Planned PRs" for the PLANS view. Now uses the config's `display_name` directly.
4. **`dash_data.py`** — Changed default label from `("erk-pr", "erk-plan")` to `("erk-pr",)`.
5. **`list_cmd.py`** — Changed default labels in both `_pr_list_impl` and `_run_interactive_mode` from `("erk-pr", "erk-plan")` to `("erk-pr",)`.
6. **`label-scheme.md`** — Updated documentation to reflect that `erk-pr` is now the base label on all erk-submitted PRs (plans + code).
